description: The product quality is consistently outstanding, exceeding my expectations every time. I highly recommend this business. Thank You
author: RANJAN K.
pros: I found everything I was looking for in this product, and the prices were reasonable. Pricing is fair and transparent - definitely value for money.”
cons: I could not find Salary Processing system with Software. Would be helpful if guided with such services as well.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I am still learning my way around it, but it's pretty straightforward. I'm still finding out about features that I did not even know about almost a week later.
author: Derrel R.
pros: This platform is much more than just a "time clock", it has almost every feature you would need to run a business, all in 1.
cons: there is not much to dislike about it. To get all of the features you do have to pay, but it is very well worth it in my opinion.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Easy to use, hard to complain when it's free
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: That I can accurately and easily determine the amount of time that I spend working without paying for a service.
cons: That if I forget to check how many hours I worked in a day, there's no report (at least that I can find) that I can look at later on.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I have a very positive experience with Clock IT. The support team are always available to help even when they are very busy there is always someone dedicated to help.
author: Angelika B.
pros: I used to work on many systems like this but I find Clock It easy to use. It's intuitive and easy to use through laptop, tablet and phone.
cons: Some options are difficult to find but when you get to know the system, it's all easy to set up. The customer service team's contact details could be a little more visible, but it's equally ease to google it out.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Very satisfied with this product. It has been very beneficial for our team and the reports are in line with what our account department requires for payroll purposes.
author: Sonia P.
pros: The entire app makes our job much easier with easy to use features and security. It is an efficient time tracker.
cons: There are no negative aspects. We have been using Clockit for over 3 years and are happy with how it has facilitated our job.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Great tool for the team to use!
description: Great experience and good for the team. It's helpful, keeps communication very open and clear, and also has a form of tracking it.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It helps keep track of time and can be used as reference. It's helpful when we want to look back and track hours and times.
cons: Nothing. There was nothing that I disliked about ClockIt. It is a helpful tool and so far, having a resource on Google chats is good.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I love it! I'm going to start using it for my business for my new employees, it will help me keep everything organzied.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Time Tracking, timer, security, and all the features, including the HR management side. VERY COST-EFFECTIVE
cons: It's all great! I don't think there was anything that I didn't like on it. Super easy to use. (user-friendly)
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: overall i love the app, i feel its going to be a great opp. for my small business to grow with less stress on how much my employees work at their locations
author: Brendon W.
pros: so far weve loved the app, we are a small business and it makes a great look for a small business like us to look more profession
cons: i didnt really like that some things settings are focused on a computer and some are on the phone. its makes it a bit confusing
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good one command software for remote workers
author: RAJNISH K.
pros: I like all the elements and features included in clockit, i really found helpfull as a team lead for managing a team in easy way with this automation.
cons: I like the UI but it should be developed in more user convenient way. UI has also too much light it should provide a switching according to user choice for light and dark mode. Just UI can be more better.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Really like it overall easy app to use and I cant wait to see how well it works with mutople clients.
author: Emmanuel P.
pros: commands to clock in and out and can my clients can see the real time? I would like to know if they can see it?
cons: up front instructions on how we can get started with things like commands, more over how does our client see the time punches?
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Easy to use, great interface and customization in the payroll timesheet.
author: Fred P.
pros: ClockIt is very intuitive, easy to use, and has great features that could easily help me in my time tracking and payroll tasks.
cons: Maybe in the future, devs can add a way to pay directly from the app/site.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I had a pretty good experience from clockit
author: Andrew F.
pros: Works great to track employees and how they spend time
cons: Didnt work when employees left the tracking tab
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I give Clockit 5 stars out of 5 and I highly recommend for small to mid size business to try.
author: Maristhel M.
pros: Clockit is simple and straight to the point. Less is More!!!
cons: I think what can be improved is basically when an employee forgets to clock out it should either send them text or email saying they forgot to clock out
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: It is the best i will tell all my friends and family to down it
author: Veta R.
pros: I LOVE EVERYTHING ABOUT CLOCKIT, Thanks,
cons: Everything was great keep being awesome
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: ClockIt offers all the features and flexibility you need to manage a modern team
description: Over all our experience was good, and once set up, ClockIt has served our needs flawlessly. I would highly recommend ClockIt, especially is you have a team that is multi-National.
author: Kevin M.
pros: ClockIt is feature rich and very flexible. It allows us to manage our team who is scattered across different facilities, countries and time zones. Support is responsive and helpful and you will find plenty of well written tutorials that walk you through the features and set up.
cons: There are a lot of features in ClockIt so it takes a little while to set up and configure especially if you have multiple facilities. Make sure you set up enough time fro this process. But once you have it configured, it really works well. Also the report writer is very flexible and it takes some time to configure reports for your payroll processor as well as configuring reports for managing your attendance and benefits tracking.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Sill learning but so far it is easy to use and come with videos to hep learn it.
author: Karen C.
pros: User friendly and comes with videos to help explain how to use.
cons: I have not found anything yet that I do not like!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Marcus R.
pros: Love the ClockIt app! It's very easy to punch in and out!
cons: No cons. Quick, easy, and affordable and integrates with Gchat.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Putting load of time management on staff instead of managers.
author: Susan L.
pros: Holiday pay works well, PTO, schedule, ease of use
cons: Would love to see a mileage request section and a few other features we have requested. Does have a steep learning curve however it is easy to use once you get used to it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: N/A product was just set up so far services are fine
author: Shonna W.
pros: No favorites as of yet but I have no complaints about the product
cons: N/A at this I just started set up so far no complaints
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: melanni H.
pros: easy system, very helpful, amazing dashboard
cons: IM DOING SOME TEST STILL BUT I LIKE IT SO FAR
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Randall A.
pros: This was easy to implement for our team and a simple way to keep track of our team’s hours.
cons: If I have to say something, it’s the cost, but that isn’t prohibitive.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Ayham A.
pros: brilliant interface, flexible platform, great in attendance management, easy to use, perfect permissions control.
cons: this was designed for small companies, Very weak electronic forms, No forms auto fill, other apps are much more established in documenting the HR Records, No electronic Signatures, No flexibility in calculating the Leaves as per companies needs (example: no possibilities for calendar days leave calculation, only working days). No multi layers reporting (only one manager), No multiple approvals available (only the reported manager can approve). the approvals are not properly reflected with signatures on the final created form.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Sean D.
pros: The Google Workspace app right inside of our system along with employees being able to clock in from any device and network
cons: There is nothing i did not like about ClockIT
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Exactly what we were looking for for our small business!
description: Increased accuracy in tracking employee hours.
author: Elizabeth B.
pros: It is very easy to use! It makes tracking employee hours very user friendly and accurate. We used self reporting and our employees were shorting themselves on hours!
cons: The Dynamic Reports don't default to Monday-Friday and there's no way to change the date structure from D/M/Y to M/D/Y which means I have to go in after I've exported the report to Excel and change those by hand.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: While it can be initially confusing to navigate, its integration with Google Calendar and robust feature set make it worth the learning curve. Once mastered, it becomes an invaluable asset for enhancing productivity and task management
author: Danny W.
pros: I liked the ability to track my employees hours without having to be at the office. I also liked that it would tell me when someone who was supposed to be there wasn't.
cons: It took me a long time to figure everything out.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
